issues.criterion: careers-resource archetype has no content analysis (fully gated)
issues.details: careers-resource-bioinformatics-scientist page entry in sample-scrape.json has null url, null title, null cleaned_html_size, null content_sections, and null block_candidates. The URL https://www.almacgroup.com/careers/resources/a-day-in-the-life-of-a-bioinformatics-scientist/ redirects to a login page. All 36 careers-resource pages appear auth-gated. The archetype is omitted from archetypes_analyzed in sample-scrape.json (correctly flagged as gated). README documents this as a 'Partial Capture'. Downstream migration agents cannot determine content structure or block patterns for this archetype.
issues.remediation: Downstream agents should treat careers-resource as a gated archetype and skip or stub content analysis. If any public careers-resource URLs can be identified via sitemap or search, substitute one as the sample.

issues.criterion: knowledge-library-a-phase-ii page captures a 404 error page with empty content analysis
issues.details: The page slug 'knowledge-library-a-phase-ii-study-evaluating-the-safety-and-efficacy-of-two-amg' has null content_sections, null block_candidates, null cleaned_html_size. The README documents this as a 404 capture. Screenshots exist but show an error page. This page should not be used as a knowledge-library archetype reference.
issues.remediation: The primary knowledge-library sample (slug 'knowledge-library', URL ...2019-investments-centered-around-cell-and-gene-therapies/) is a valid 200 capture with 27KB cleaned HTML and 4 content sections. Downstream agents should use that as the archetype reference.

issues.criterion: award and careers-story sample pages have very thin cleaned HTML
issues.details: award-abc-council-business-awards-2022 has cleaned_html_size=392 bytes (only a HubSpot form extracted). careers-story-curtis-campbell has cleaned_html_size=84 bytes. Both have raw_html_size ~200-300KB and metadata.text_length ~10K, indicating real content exists on the live site but was not extracted into the cleaned_html. Award pages appear to be primarily form-gated content; careers-story is on the careers sub-site which requires login for some paths.
issues.remediation: The award archetype's block pattern (form-embed/HubSpot) is still accurately captured. careers-story block pattern (sidebar + form) is captured. Downstream agents can proceed with these patterns while noting cleaned content will be sparse.

issues.criterion: job-listing archetype present in sample but not in manifest
issues.details: sample-scrape.json archetypes_analyzed contains 'job-listing' (mapped to careers-careers slug, page_count=1) but manifest.json has no 'job-listing' archetype — the careers-careers page is subsumed under the 'careers' archetype in the manifest (count=157). This is a minor categorization difference introduced during Phase 2a analysis.
issues.remediation: Downstream agents should note that 'job-listing' in the sample corresponds to the 'careers' archetype in the manifest. The careers-careers slug covers job listing pages.

issues.criterion: careers-news-almac sample (news-post #1) has zero headings and 7143 bytes cleaned HTML
issues.details: The first news-post sample (careers-news-almac-recognised-at-the-nus-2023-awards, URL https://www.almacgroup.com/careers/news/almac-recognised-at-the-nus-2023-awards/) has 0 headings extracted and only 7143 bytes cleaned HTML. The second news-post sample (clinical-services-news) is richer: 4 headings, 10108 bytes, and identifies related-content cards block. The careers subdomain may have a different template that prevents heading extraction.
issues.remediation: Use clinical-services-news as the primary news-post archetype reference. The careers-news sample is secondary and likely represents a sub-site variant.

evidence.finding: File exists at 248271 bytes, is valid JSON. Top-level keys: generated_at, source_site, total_pages_crawled, archetypes_analyzed, pages, archetype_summary. Contains 32 page entries matching all 32 source-bundle page directories exactly. archetypes_analyzed covers 27 archetypes (all manifest archetypes present except careers-resource, which is documented as gated). archetype_summary is a simple count dict with 28 entries.

evidence.render_strategy: Python set comparison of manifest.archetypes[].name vs sample.archetypes_analyzed.keys()
evidence.finding: 27 manifest archetypes vs 27 sample archetypes. Difference: careers-resource missing from sample (expected — gated archetype, documented). Extra in sample: job-listing (careers sub-categorization). All other 26 archetypes covered in both.

evidence.render_strategy: os.listdir cross-check + file existence + file size validation
evidence.finding: All 32 page slugs in sample-scrape.json have corresponding directories in source-bundle/pages/ with index.html, desktop.png, mobile.png, and meta.json. No missing or zero-byte files. Source-bundle and sample-scrape page sets are identical.

evidence.render_strategy: File inspection of sample-scrape.json events page entry
evidence.finding: events archetype: 4 content sections (breadcrumbs, content-slider/carousel, filter/facet, hubspot-form), 2 block candidates (filter custom high confidence, form-embed hubspot high confidence), 25 headings, cleaned_html=43625 bytes, raw_html=408343 bytes. Thorough analysis — filter block is high-confidence EDS pattern identification.

evidence.render_strategy: File inspection of sample-scrape.json knowledge-library page entry
evidence.finding: knowledge-library archetype: 4 content sections (breadcrumbs, article-body/default-content, profile-details/profile, hubspot-form), 2 block candidates (profile custom high, form-embed high), 7 headings, cleaned_html=27386 bytes. Adequate analysis — identifies article+profile+form pattern for this archetype.

evidence.render_strategy: File inspection of sample-scrape.json clinical-services-news page entry
evidence.finding: news-post archetype (primary): 5 sections (breadcrumbs, sidebar/nav, article-body/default-content, related-content/card-grid, hubspot-form), 3 block candidates (sidebar medium, cards/related-content high, form-embed high), 4 headings including h1, cleaned_html=10108 bytes. Thorough analysis with related-content cards pattern identified.

evidence.render_strategy: File inspection of sample-scrape.json clinical-services page entry
evidence.finding: clinical-services archetype: 6 sections (hero/hero-banner, breadcrumbs, animated-intro/intro-content, video-embed/media, full-image/media, hubspot-form), 5 block candidates (hero high, embed-video high, section-full-width-image medium, default-content-animated-intro medium, form-embed high), 20 headings, cleaned_html=24395 bytes. Thorough analysis covering carousel hero, video, and animated intro patterns.

careers-resource sample has null content_sections, null block_candidates, null cleaned_html_size in sample-scrape.json. README documents this as a login-redirect partial capture. The archetype is correctly excluded from archetypes_analyzed. This is the only archetype with zero analysis coverage — all 36 pages appear auth-gated.

archetype_summary is a flat dict of {archetype_name: page_count}. High-volume: events=928, knowledge-library=723, news-post=679, clinical-services=209. This confirms the prioritization order for migration work. The summary is page-count only (no block analysis summary), so downstream agents must consult the pages dict for block patterns.

summary: PASS — sample-scrape.json is well-formed JSON with 32 page entries fully matching source-bundle. All 27 manifest archetypes covered in archetypes_analyzed except careers-resource (correctly excluded as auth-gated, documented). High-volume archetypes (events, knowledge-library, news-post, clinical-services) all have thorough section/block analysis. Two empty-content pages (careers-resource login-redirect, knowledge-library-a-phase-ii 404) are documented limitations. Award and careers-story pages have thin cleaned HTML due to form/sub-site gating but block patterns are still captured.
